description: Workflow for processing entity_name entities, fetching data and updating timestamp
name: entity_name_workflow

transitions.description: Start processing the entity by fetching data from API
transitions.end_state_description: Entity data fetched from external API
transitions.name: start_processing
transitions.start_state_description: Initial state with no entity data

transitions.description: Update the fetchedAt timestamp after data fetching
transitions.end_state_description: Entity processing completed with updated timestamp
transitions.name: update_timestamp
